metadata.description: Comprehensive Java development expertise bundle with agent-first architecture for autonomous code implementation, testing, and standards compliance

skill:ext-triage-java.description: Triage extension for Java findings during plan-finalize phase

skill:java-cdi.description: Core CDI patterns including constructor injection, scopes, producers, events, observers, and interceptors

skill:java-core.description: Core Java development standards for patterns, modern features, and performance optimization

skill:java-lombok.description: Lombok patterns including @Delegate, @Builder, @UtilityClass for reducing boilerplate

skill:java-maintenance.description: Java code maintenance standards including prioritization, refactoring triggers, and compliance verification

skill:java-null-safety.description: JSpecify null safety annotations with @NullMarked, @Nullable, and package-level configuration

skill:java-quarkus.description: Quarkus-specific CDI standards with testing, native image support, and GraalVM reflection configuration

skill:javadoc.description: JavaDoc documentation standards including class, method, and code example patterns

skill:junit-core.description: JUnit 5 core testing patterns with AAA structure, test organization, and coverage standards

skill:junit-integration.description: Maven integration testing with Failsafe plugin, IT naming conventions, and profile configuration

skill:junit-weld-testing.description: Weld Testing standards for CDI unit testing with @EnableAutoWeld, @AddBeanClasses, and auto-discovery patterns

skill:manage-maven-profiles.description: Maven build profile classification and user workflow for unmatched profiles
